common.tagline: Practise running a business safely before investing real money
common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

landing.subtitle: AI-powered business simulation for rural women entrepreneurs
landing.feature1Desc: Practice running a business with virtual money — zero risk
landing.feature2Desc: Get guidance in your language from your personal AI mentor
landing.feature3Desc: Face real business scenarios and learn from every decision
landing.testimonial1: AI Rural Business Trainer helped me understand pricing before I invested my savings
landing.testimonial2: I learned about GPay frauds without losing money
landing.testimonial3: Lakshmi didi explains everything so simply in Telugu!

auth.loginTitle: Welcome to AI Rural Business Trainer
auth.rateLimitError: Too many attempts. Please wait 1 hour.

dashboard.title: My Dashboard
dashboard.noBusiness: You haven't started any business yet. Create one now!

business.typeVoiceHint: Say your business type or type it
business.capitalLabel: How much money will you start with?
business.maxBusinesses: You can have up to 3 businesses

mentor.greeting: Namaste! I'm Lakshmi, your business mentor 🙏

learn.title: Learn Business Skills
learn.quizPass: Great job! You earned a badge!
learn.quizFail: Keep learning! Try again in 24 hours.

pricing.q0: If your product costs ₹50 to make, what's a good selling price?
pricing.q1: What happens if you price too high?
pricing.q2: When should you consider giving a discount?
pricing.o2_2: During festivals or to clear old stock
pricing.q4: If you sell 10 items at ₹80 each with ₹50 cost, what's your profit?

inventory.q0: What happens if you buy too much perishable inventory?
inventory.o0_1: Items may spoil and waste money
inventory.q1: How many days of stock should you keep for vegetables?
inventory.q2: A supplier offers 50% discount on bulk. What should you check first?
inventory.o2_1: Check if items will sell before they expire

digitalPayments.q0: How can you verify a GPay payment was received?
digitalPayments.o0_1: Check your bank app for the credit
digitalPayments.q1: Customer shows payment screenshot but money hasn't arrived. What do you do?
digitalPayments.o1_1: Wait until money shows in your account
digitalPayments.o2_1: Unified Payments Interface for digital payments
digitalPayments.q3: Which is safer for business payments?
digitalPayments.q4: How do you get a QR code for your shop?
digitalPayments.o4_1: Register with a UPI app like GPay or PhonePe

customerService.q0: A customer wants a refund. What should you do first?
customerService.o0_1: Listen to their complaint and understand the issue
customerService.q1: How can you build repeat customers?
customerService.o1_2: Good quality, fair price, and friendly service
customerService.q2: Best response when a customer complains about quality?
customerService.o2_1: Apologize, replace if possible, and improve
customerService.o3_1: They buy more consistently and recommend to others
customerService.q4: How should you handle a busy period?

voice.micDenied: Microphone access denied. You can type instead.

s0.scenario: A customer wants to buy 5 items. But they don't have cash and want to pay via GPay. You haven't set up GPay yet.
s0.oA: Ask for cash only — you don't want to miss a sale
s0.oB: Set up GPay right now and accept the payment
s0.oC: Offer a 10% discount if they come back with cash tomorrow

s1.scenario: Diwali is coming in 3 days! Your supplier offers a 30% bulk discount on raw materials, but you need to order double your usual amount.
s1.oA: Order normal amount — don't risk overstocking
s1.oB: Order 50% extra — moderate increase for the festival
s1.oC: Order double — maximum stock for maximum Diwali sales

s2.scenario: A new competitor has opened nearby with lower prices. Some of your regular customers have started buying from them.
s2.oA: Keep prices same — focus on quality and loyal customers
s2.oB: Match competitor price — even if margin drops
s2.oC: Lower prices even more — try to win back all customers

mentorDemo.success: Good choice choosing option {{choice}}! Your business made ₹{{revenue}} in revenue today. You sold {{sales}} items. Keep going! 💪
